body.purpose: Default running text. Cap at 65-75ch on prose.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Card hover state. 200ms ease-out. Subtle — premium-fintech, not Material.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Featured / hero card resting elevation. Used on the landing hero rounded-2xl panel.

motion.name: ease-out-quick
motion.purpose: All colour and shadow transitions. The system's only motion floor.

components.name: Primary Pill Button
components.description: Default action. Black pill, white text, hover shifts to #1f1f1f.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #ffffff; background: #000000; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1f1f1f; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }

components.name: Arrow-Circle Pill (Signature CTA)
components.description: Signature CTA — black pill with a trailing white circular badge containing an arrow. Used on hero and 'Meet' / 'Use cases' sections only.
components.css: .ds-btn-arrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 8px 8px 32px; border-radius: 9999px; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: #ffffff; background: #000000; transition: background-color 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-arrow:hover { background: #1f1f1f; } .ds-btn-arrow-circle { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #ffffff; color: #000000; transition: transform 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-arrow:hover .ds-btn-arrow-circle { transform: translateX(2px); } .ds-btn-arrow:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); }

components.name: Secondary Pill Button
components.description: Supporting actions. White pill, black text, hairline ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; color: #000000; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2), 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); }

components.name: Default Card (white)
components.description: Default surface. White, rounded-2xl, flat resting, lift on hover.
components.html:
รายวิชาที่สอน

คณิตศาสตร์ ม.4 ครูสมชาย ห้อง ม.4/2 เทอม 1/2568
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; transition: box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06), 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.04); } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #000000; margin: 0 0 12px; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-body { font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(0,0,0,0.7); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Dark Card (aubergine)
components.description: Aubergine card surface. Used 1-2 times per page max for contrast moments. NEVER as a button.
components.html:
เปิดได้ทุกที่
ทุกเวลา

เว็บ มือถือ แท็บเล็ต — เข้าสู่ระบบเดียวกัน
components.css: .ds-card-dark { background: #2B2644; border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px; min-height: 320px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-dark-title { font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-card-dark-body { font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Rounded-xl field. Hairline ring carries the affordance. Black focus ring (no longer gold).
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="กรอกรหัสห้อง" />
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.6; color: #000000; transition: box-shadow 150ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4); } .ds-input:hover { box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 2px #000000; }

components.name: Neutral Badge
components.description: Identifier chip. Neutral grayscale (no saturated role colours — superseded ADR-0011's rose/blue/emerald scheme).
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: #000000; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); font-family: var(--font-anuphan, system-ui), sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; }

narrative.overview:
Studennnn looks and feels like a premium private-banking app stripped of any flourish, paired with a leather-bound family ledger left open on a quiet desk. Off-white surface, true black ink, one deep aubergine reserved for the moment of contrast. The interface holds itself with the discipline of a financial product, applied to the domain of a school's daily record-keeping.

The system explicitly rejects four neighbourhoods that PRODUCT.md calls out by name: government ERP, Thai EdTech default, Google Classroom Material, and generic AI-SaaS landing slop. Premium fintech as a family — Halo, Linear, Stripe Sessions — is the lane we live in, not the lane we avoid. This theme supersedes ADR-0011 Ink + Gold via ADR-0014.
keyCharacteristics: Quiet · Premium · Modern (revised from Sophisticated · Modern · Crafted)
Tri-tonal: off-white body, true black ink, deep aubergine reserved for contrast moments
Single typeface (Anuphan — Cadson Demak, Latin + Thai) at three weights, 600 ceiling
Tight negative letter-spacing on all display + headline (-0.04em to -0.02em)
Pill geometry for actions (rounded-full), 2xl for cards (16px), 3xl for featured (24px)
No gradient text, no shimmer, no float, no tilt, no glass — motion is colour transitions and gentle shadow only
Hero surfaces lean on full-bleed media inside rounded-2xl cards, not CSS scenery

rules.name: The Aubergine-Is-Surface Rule
rules.body: Aubergine (#2B2644) is a card background colour. It is never a button, never an icon, never a chart series. One or two aubergine cards per page is the ceiling.

rules.name: The True-Black Rule
rules.body: No almost-black softening. Primary text and primary button surface are #000000 exactly.

rules.name: The No-Saturated-Role-Colour Rule
rules.body: Admin / Teacher / Student badges are neutral grayscale, not rose/blue/emerald. Role differentiation moves to placement and label, not chroma.

rules.name: The Anuphan-Only Rule
rules.body: No serif. No second display font. Anuphan carries display, body, and label across every page.

rules.name: The 600-Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Weight 600 (semibold) is the heaviest weight in the system, including display h1. Weight 700 is forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Uppercase-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section eyebrows stay sentence case at 0.875rem weight 500. Tracked uppercase eyebrows are forbidden.

rules.name: The Negative-Tracking-Floor Rule
rules.body: Display tracking >= -0.04em, headline -0.03em, title -0.02em. Body and label stay at 0.

rules.name: The Thai Line-Height Rule
rules.body: Body line-height >= 1.6. Thai วรรณยุกต์ stacking requires it.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No shadow on resting cards. The rounded-2xl corner + 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) hairline carry the affordance. Shadow appears on hover or for featured surfaces only.

rules.name: The 200ms Transition Rule
rules.body: Shadow and colour transitions run 200ms ease-out.

dos: Do anchor every page in true black (#000000) text on Off-White (#F5F5F5) or Surface White (#FFFFFF)
Do reach for Aubergine (#2B2644) only as a card surface, only 1-2 times per page
Do use rounded-full for buttons, rounded-2xl for cards, rounded-3xl for featured / hero
Do apply negative letter-spacing on display + headline + title — the tracking is the voice
Do keep weight 600 as the heaviest ceiling. No weight 700.
Do use the arrow-circle pill as the signature CTA
Do keep resting cards flat. Lift only on hover.
Do use full-bleed media inside rounded-2xl hero card — not CSS scenery
Do wrap motion in prefers-reduced-motion: reduce
Do verify text contrast >= 4.5:1 on every text-on-image surface
donts: Don't use almost-black softening. Primary text is #000000.
Don't put Aubergine on a button. Aubergine is a surface.
Don't use weight 700 anywhere. 600 is the ceiling.
Don't use uppercase tracked eyebrows above sections.
Don't use saturated semantic colours for role identification. Admin/Teacher/Student badges are grayscale.
Don't use shimmer, float, tilt, mesh-bg, blob, sheen, glass, or any Ink+Gold motion utility. Removed from globals.css.
Don't add a second display font.
Don't style like government ERP, Thai EdTech default, Google Classroom Material, or generic AI-SaaS slop.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe.
Don't put body text on tinted backgrounds without verifying 4.5:1 contrast.
